zh.lifeSummary: 當Gertrud von Tessin Lyse於1330年出生在德國梅可倫波-沃爾包莫羅斯托克羅斯托克時，她的父親Hermann Lyse or Lise26歲，母親N N von Volkenshagen21歲。她於1349年之前與Peter Gronenhagen在德國福萊斯塔阿特 梅可倫波-史維林羅斯托克結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於1369年在她的家鄉享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gertrud von Tessin Lyse于1330年出生在德国梅可倫波-沃爾包莫羅斯托克羅斯托克时，她的父亲Hermann Lyse or Lise26岁，母亲N N von Volkenshagen21岁。她于1349年之前与Peter Gronenhagen在德国福萊斯塔阿特 梅可倫波-史維林羅斯托克结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她去世于1369年在她的家乡享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lyse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a boundary (from Old Norman French devise ‘boundary’), or at a place called with this word, such as Viza in Ashwater (Devon), Vyse Wood in Morthoe (Devon), or Devizes (Wiltshire).

nameMeanings.name: Gertrud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

variants.name: Gertraud
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

variants.name: Gertraut
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

variants.name: Jonathan
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Tessin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places so named in Mecklenburg.

en.lifeSummary: When Gertrud von Tessin Lyse was born in 1330, in Rostock, Rostock, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germany, her father, Hermann Lyse or Lise, was 26 and her mother, N N von Volkenshagen, was 21. She married Peter Gronenhagen before 1349, in Rostock, Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Germany. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died in 1369, in her hometown, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gertrud von Tessin Lyse est née en 1330, à Rostock, Rostock, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Allemagne, son père, Hermann Lyse or Lise, avait 26 ans et sa mère, N N von Volkenshagen, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Peter Gronenhagen avant 1349, à Rostock, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée en 1369, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gertrud von Tessin Lyse 1330 in Rostock, Rostock, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hermann Lyse or Lise 26 und ihre Mutter N N von Volkenshagen 21. Sie hat vor 1349 in Rostock, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Deutschland Peter Gronenhagen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb 1369 im Alter von 39 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrud von Tessin Lyse è nata il nel 1330 nel Rostock, Rostock, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germania, sua padre, Hermann Lyse or Lise, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, N N von Volkenshagen, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Peter Gronenhagen prima del 1349, nel Rostock, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel 1369, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gertrud von Tessin Lyseが1330年にドイツメックレンブルグ-ボルプオンメルンロストックロストックで生まれた時，父Hermann Lyse or Liseは26歳，母N N von Volkenshagenは21歳であった。1349年以前にドイツフレイスタアト メックレンブルグ-スチウエリンロストックでPeter Gronenhagenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼女は1369年に故郷で39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gertrud von Tessin Lyse(이)가 1330년 독일 클렌버그-보르폼머 로스톡 로스톡에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hermann Lyse or Lise(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 N N von Volkenshagen(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1349년 이전 독일 프레이스타앳 클렌버그-슈워인 로스톡에서 Peter Gronenhagen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1369년 그녀의 고향에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrud von Tessin Lyse nasceu em 1330, em Rostock, Rostock, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemanha, seu pai, Hermann Lyse or Lise, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, N N von Volkenshagen, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Peter Gronenhagen antes 1349, em Rostock, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1369, em sua cidade natal, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gertrud von Tessin Lyse родилась в 1330 г. в местности ростокк, ростокк, меккленбург-ворпоммирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Hermann Lyse or Lise было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали N N von Volkenshagen, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peter Gronenhagen перед 1349 г. в местности ростокк, фристаат меккленбург-щвирин, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она умерла в 1369 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gertrud von Tessin Lyse nació en 1330, en Rostock, Rostock, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemania, su papá, Hermann Lyse or Lise, tenía 26 años y su mamá, N N von Volkenshagen, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Peter Gronenhagen antes de 1349, en Rostock, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió en 1369, en su pueblo, a la edad de 39 años.
